n: The Westfold: To the King's Aid

steps.t: King Théoden, along with Éomer, Aragorn, Legolas, and Gimli, have begun a journey towards the Fords of Isen. You should meet the king and his company …
You have spotted a gathering of people on the road in the centre of the Westfold. You should speak with someone in this company to get word of Gandalf…
You have spotted a gathering of people on the road in the centre of the Westfold. You should ask the refugees if they need assistance.
Helm's Deep is in the valley in the south-western corner of the Westfold. You should ride with all speed to the gate of the stronghold of Helm's Deep.
